texto: The most insidous influence on the young is not violence, drugs, drink or sexual perversion, but our pursuit of the trivial and tolerance of the third rate.
autor: Dr. Eric Anderson Headmaster of Eton. .
explicacao: Citação de Dr. Eric Anderson Headmaster of Eton. . sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The most insidous influence on the young is not violence, drugs, drink or sexual perversion, but …” articula reflexao, teaching, insidous em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
